description_long: This is a rounded, bulbous vase with a wide body that tapers gently toward a narrow, open mouth. The surface is adorned with an impressionistic painted scene, featuring a blend of soft greens, whites, and pinks, with a prominent abstract figure of a cyclist visible on one side. The artwork wraps around the midsection, evoking a sense of movement and landscape, possibly depicting a park or urban green space. The upper portion of the vase is a smooth, matte white, while the lower half transitions into muted green tones. The interior appears to be a pale, unglazed ceramic. The overall finish is matte, with subtle brushstroke textures visible in the painted areas.
description: A bulbous ceramic vase with a matte white upper section and an impressionistic painted landscape, including an abstract cyclist, wrapping around the midsection.
description_view_0: This view shows the vase's rounded form with a soft transition from white to green, and a blurred, impressionistic landscape scene.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the painted foliage and landscape, with the abstract cyclist figure just out of sight, and more visible brushstroke textures.
description_view_2: The front features the most prominent abstract cyclist figure in dark red, set against a green and pink landscape background.
description_view_3: This side displays the landscape motif with no visible figures, emphasizing the soft blending of green and white tones.
